method: Google Cloud Vision API (label, text, color, face, object detection)
api_key_note: Set VISION_API_KEY env var to reuse

text_on_thumbnail.insight: Text is nearly universal. Not a differentiator.
text_on_thumbnail.insight_words: BREAKOUT thumbnails have HALF the words (6.3 vs 11.7). Shorter, punchier text wins.

faces.insight: Faces UNDERPERFORM. Only 22% of breakouts have faces vs 30% of normal. Multiple faces especially bad. Counterintuitive — everyone recommends faces on thumbnails, but not in THIS niche.

Graphics.description: Graphic design elements, text overlays, composited visuals

Symbol.description: Iconic or symbolic imagery (not literal photography)

Clip art.description: Stylized illustrations, vector graphics, drawn elements

visual_style.insight: GRAPHIC/ILLUSTRATED style beats PHOTOGRAPHIC style in this niche. Designed compositions with symbols and text overlays outperform photos of people.

dominant_colors.explanation: Breakout thumbnails trend LIGHTER than normal thumbnails
dominant_colors.insight: Normal thumbnails are 70% dark/black. Breakout thumbnails are more likely to have light/white backgrounds (22% vs 16%). Don't default to dark.

combined_production_spec.title: Question format ('What is X?') or 'The [Secret/Ancient] Of [Topic]' — proven formulas
combined_production_spec.thumbnail_colors: Light/white background, contrasting text, avoid all-dark
combined_production_spec.thumbnail_faces: Avoid faces. Use symbols, icons, or illustrated elements instead.
